title: Proclamation No. 1157, s. 2015
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 1157

DECLARING MONDAY, 16 NOVEMBER 2015, AS A SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE PROVINCE OF OCCIDENTAL MINDORO

WHEREAS, the Province of Occidental Mindoro marks the celebration of its 65th Founding Anniversary on 15 November 2015;

WHEREAS, to enable the people of the Province of Occidental Mindoro to celebrate the occasion, the Office of the Governor requested that Monday, 16 November 2015, be declared as a special (non-working) day instead of 15 November 2015, which falls on a Sunday;

WHEREAS, it is but fitting and proper that the people of the Province of Occidental Mindoro be given full opportunity to celebrate and participate in the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, PAQUITO N. OCHOA, JR, Executive Secretary, by authority of His Excellency, BENIGNO S. AQUINO III, do hereby declare Monday, 16 November 2015, as a special (non-working) day in the Province of Occidental Mindoro.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 12th day of November, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Fifteen.

By authority of the President:

(Sgd.) PAQUITO N. OCHOA, JR. Executive Secretary
